CATHERINE QUIGLEY (IN PROPER-DEFT-OP

RULING:ARGUED and the Court(HEARD THRU IN-CAMERA SESSION).MOTION GRANTED-CONDITIONS: 1. THAT MR. BRENNAN (PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL) HAS TO FILE A REALESE OF MECHANICS LIEN BEFORE ORDER BE SUBMITTED FOR JUDGE'S SIGNATURE.2.THAT AN ACCOUNTING OF THE $2,000 THAT MS. QUIGLEY PAID TO THE COUNSEL SUPPOSEDLY FOR EXPERT FEES BE PROVIDED AS TO TO VERIFY IF THERE'S REMAINDER ON THE AMOUNT.3. THAT COURT MADE NO RULING ON THE ATTORNEY'S FEES FOR THE FILING OF THIS MOTION, IT SHOULD BE SETTLED BETWEEN THEM. 4.
